ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "spp_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species (SPP_CODE) */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Taxonomic family of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  "spp" TEXT /* Specific epithet (species name) */,
  "spp_grp" TEXT /* Grouping classification for the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "ecological_significance" TEXT /* Ecological significance of the species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spp_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES families ("family_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_genus FOREIGN KEY ("genus") REFERENCES genera ("genus_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family characteristics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genera" (
  "genus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus */,
  "genus_name" TEXT /* Name of the genus */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family to which the genus belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genera_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, guest) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "spp_code" INTEGER /* ID of the species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the species */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the species record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_spp_code FOREIGN KEY ("spp_code") REFERENCES species ("spp_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic change */,
  "spp_code" INTEGER /* ID of the species affected by the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., genus update, family reclassification) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxonomic_changes_spp_code FOREIGN KEY ("spp_code") REFERENCES species ("spp_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "spp_code" INTEGER /* ID of the species being tracked */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the species is found */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country where the species is found */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_distribution_spp_code FOREIGN KEY ("spp_code") REFERENCES species ("spp_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecological_significances" (
  "significance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecological significance */,
  "significance_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecological significance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ecological significance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("significance_id")
)
